rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies the inaccurate rationale in the updated module docstring (lines 6-9 of Quadratic.lean) that claims the finrank lemmas "combine the normal form with ... scalar restriction"; the added theorems use only minpoly + finrank_mul_finrank + restrictScalars_adjoin_eq_sup and reference none of the existing normal-form results. Fixing it produces strictly better documentation; Review 2's approval leaves the mismatch in place.
